message:
fix(mux): use surface pointer for PBO state to fix multi-panel isolation

- Change PBO state manager to key by surface_id (pointer) instead of
  fbo_id, preventing state collisions when OpenGL recycles FBO IDs
- Add strict GL state isolation (PACK_ALIGNMENT, PACK_ROW_LENGTH,
  PACK_SKIP_PIXELS, PACK_SKIP_ROWS) before every pixel read
- Add glFinish() synchronization to prevent GPU race conditions
- Force initial render on panel creation to populate FBO immediately
- Add encodeWithDimensions() for explicit frame dimension handling
